title: Oh Priya Priya Song Lyrics Geethanjali
stanzas: <div>Oh Priya Priya Song Lyrics Geethanjali

Oh priya priya
en priya priya
yezhai kadhal vazhumo
irulum oliyum serumo

nee orr oaram
naan orr oaram
kaanal neeraal
thaagam theeraadhu

Oh priya priya
un priya priya
Oh priya priya
un priya priya

inainthidaadhu povadho
vaanam boomi aavadho
kaalam siridhu
kadhal manadhu
thevan neethaan ponaal vidadhu

thaedum kangale
thaembum nenjame
veedum poiyadi
vazhvum poiyadi

anbu konda nenjamum
aasai konda nenjamum
aanaiyittu maarumo
penmai thaangumo

raaja mangai kangale
endrum ennai moipatho
vaadum yezhai ingo
or paavi allavao

edhanaalum orunaalum
maraiyaadhu pemaiyum
erithaalum marithaalum
vilagaatha paasamo

kanni maanum unnudan
kalandhathenna paavamo
kadhal enna kaatrile
kulaindha pogum megamo

ammaadi naanum yaengavo
neeyum vaa vaa

Oh Priya priya
en priya priya
Oh priya priya
un priya priya

Kaalithaasan yedugal
kanna raasa leelaigal
paruva mogam thandhadhu
paavam allavae.

Shajahanin kadhali
Tajmahal poongili
paasam vaitha paavamthaan
saavum vandhadhu

irandhaale iravaadhu
vilaigindra premaiye
adi neeye valiyaaga
varugindra penmaiye

vizhiyil pookkum nesamaai
punithamaana bandhamaai
pesum indha paasame
ingu vetri kollume

ilankanni unnudan
kooda vaa vaa

Oh Priya priya
en priya priya
Oh priya priya
un priya priya

yaekkam enna payingili
ennai vandhu seradi
nenjam rendum naalum paada
kaaval thaandi poovai
ingaada

kaadhal keethanam
kaanum mangalam
thaemai naadagam
penmai aadidum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Priya Priya'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, encapsulating the essence of love and connection.

What is the context of the song in the movie Geethanjali?

In Geethanjali, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Oh Priya Priya'?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Oh Priya Priya' was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Oh Priya Priya' released?

The song was released on May 10, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the enchanting song 'Oh Priya Priya', the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and longing, making it a quintessential romantic melody. Featured in the movie Geethanjali, this song plays a significant role in illustrating the deep connection between the characters. The soothing voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, combined with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Overall, the song remains a beloved classic that resonates with listeners even today.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Priya Priya from Geethanjali is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, this song transports listeners to a world of nostalgia and heartfelt emotions. Experience the magic of Ilaiyaraaja's composition that continues to resonate with fans across generations.
stanzaMeanings: Oh Priya Priya Song Lyrics Geethanjali
Oh dear, dear, will our love last forever, will the light of the world unite?
You are one side, I am one side, seeing you does not quench my thirst.
Oh dear, dear, your dear, dear, oh dear, dear, your dear, dear.
Will the sky and earth separate? Time is short, love is divine, if you leave, it won't be forgotten.
Searching eyes, troubled heart, life is a lie, living is a lie.
Will the loving heart and the desiring heart change? Can femininity endure?
The beautiful eyes of a princess always attract me, isn't it a sin to be here?
No matter what, or when, love will never fade, even if it is lost, it will not disappear.
What is the sin in being with you, dear? Love is like a cloud that drifts in the wind.
Oh mother, I too am somewhere, you come, come.
Oh dear, dear, your dear, dear, oh dear, dear, your dear, dear.
Kaalithasan's stories bring joy, isn't it a sin?
Shah Jahan's beloved, the Taj Mahal, is a beautiful love that has come.
In the evening, love blooms, you are the one who brings it.
This love, which speaks with pure affection, will succeed here.
Come, oh beautiful maiden, come with me.
Oh dear, dear, your dear, dear, oh dear, dear, your dear, dear.
What is the matter, my dear? My heart is always singing, guarding the flower here.
Love is a blessing, a beautiful play, femininity dances.
